content_type: social-media quote card (statement graphic over photo)
description: A statement graphic combining a photograph with an embedded screenshot-style social-media post. The upper portion is a dimly lit photograph of President Donald Trump in a dark suit, light blue shirt and red tie, standing in three-quarter view outside the White House facing a cluster of out-of-focus press microphones in the foreground. Overlaid on the lower portion is a white rounded card formatted like a Truth Social post: a small flag-patterned circular Trump avatar with 'Donald J. Trump', verified check and app badge, '@realDonaldTrump' handle, followed by a statement in black text with several phrases highlighted in yellow marker. The statement says he was asked by the Emir of Qatar (Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani), the Crown Prince of Saudi Arabia (Mohammed bin Salman Al Saud) and the President of the UAE (Mohamed bin Zayed Al Nahyan) to hold off on a planned military attack on the Islamic Republic of Iran scheduled for the next day; highlighted text includes 'serious negotiations are now taking place,' a 'Deal will be made,' and 'NO NUCLEAR WEAPONS FOR IRAN!'; it continues that he instructed Secretary of War Pete Hegseth, Chairman of the Joint Chiefs Gen. Daniel Caine, and the U.S. Military to stand down for now but be prepared for a 'full, large scale assault' if no deal is reached, signed 'President DONALD J. TRUMP'. The White House wordmark and emblem are centered at the bottom.
notable_text: serious negotiations are now taking place... a Deal will be made... This Deal will include, importantly, NO NUCLEAR WEAPONS FOR IRAN!; President DONALD J. TRUMP; The WHITE HOUSE
